title: sesamum rigidum
intro: Sesamum rigidum, also known as African or bush sesame, is a plant species in the genus Sesamum that is native to tropical Africa. It is a shrub-like plant with medicinal properties, particularly in its seeds, which contain sesamin and sesamolin, compounds with potential health benefits. The seeds of Sesamum rigidum have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including hypertension and inflammation, due to their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Sesamum rigidum seeds can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, making them a valuable addition to herbal remedies and dietary supplements.
